CustomField.description: Human-readable text stamped onto Lead.Routing_Reason__c when a lead lands in this queue. Editable in Setup so admins can re-word the audit trail without an Apex deploy. Capped at 255 to match Lead.Routing_Reason__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Audit-trail text written to Lead.Routing_Reason__c for this queue.
CustomField.label: Reason
